articles.title: Omar Abdullah demands probe into Ganderbal encounter, after family claims ‘slain had no militant links’
articles.description: “I believe the claim of the family should not be dismissed out of hand. At the very least this encounter needs a transparent and time bound probe with the facts made public. Any attempt to obfuscate or delay the announcement of a probe will only damage credibility & that is not in anyone’s interest,” says Mr. Abdullah

articles.title: Eyeing 3rd term, LDF vows to eradicate poverty in manifesto
